name: Mitragynine
description: Mitragynine appears in records as a compound reported in nan. Current source coverage is limited and still developing.
summary: Mitragynine appears in records as a compound reported in nan. Current source coverage is limited and still developing.
mechanism: Mitragynine and 7-hydroxymitragynine act as partial agonists at μ-opioid receptors with additional adrenergic and serotonergic activity.
